Container.Name: Odysseus
Container.Overview: Run Odysseus, a self-hosted AI workspace, on Unraid. The upstream repository currently has a Dockerfile that starts FROM python:3.12-slim but does not publish a ready-to-pull Odysseus image/package, so this template intentionally uses that same Python base image and bootstraps the upstream source into /app from GitHub on first start. First start can take several minutes while Debian packages and Python dependencies are installed. Keep authentication enabled for LAN/reverse-proxy deployments and set ODYSSEUS_ADMIN_PASSWORD before first boot if you do not want Odysseus to generate the initial admin password. For Ollama on the Unraid host, start Ollama with OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434 and use http://host.docker.internal:11434/v1 as the Ollama base URL. Optional companion services such as SearXNG, ChromaDB, and ntfy should be run as separate Unraid containers, then point the matching variables below at those services.
Container.PostArgs: sh -lc 'set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; if ! command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1 || ! command -v gosu >/dev/null 2>&1; then apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential cmake curl git nodejs npm tmux openssh-client gosu && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*; fi; if [ ! -f /app/app.py ]; then rm -rf /tmp/odysseus && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus.git /tmp/odysseus && cp -a /tmp/odysseus/. /app/; fi; cd /app; pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt; mkdir -p data logs services/cache/search services/cache/content .ssh .cache/huggingface .local; uid="${PUID:-99}"; gid="${PGID:-100}"; if ! getent group "$gid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then groupadd -g "$gid" odysseus; fi; if ! getent passwd "$uid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then useradd -u "$uid" -g "$gid" -M -s /bin/sh -d /app odysseus; fi; chown -R "$uid:$gid" /app; export VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_SAMPLER="${VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_SAMPLER:-0}"; exec gosu "$uid:$gid" uvicorn app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 7000'

Config.Name: Web UI
Config.Description: Odysseus web UI port

Config.Name: Application Source
Config.Description: Persist the cloned Odysseus source tree. To update to the latest upstream code, stop the container, back up this directory, remove the source files, and start the container again.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persist Odysseus app data, SQLite database, generated SSH identity, auth state, uploads, and related runtime data.

Config.Name: Logs
Config.Description: Persist Odysseus logs.

Config.Name: SSH Identity
Config.Description: Persist the Cookbook remote-server SSH identity generated or used by Odysseus.

Config.Name: HuggingFace Cache
Config.Description: Persist local model/cache downloads used by Cookbook and local model workflows.

Config.Name: Local Python Packages
Config.Description: Persist Cookbook-installed Python CLIs/packages such as vLLM and llama-cpp-python.

Config.Name: Search Cache
Config.Description: Persist Odysseus search cache data.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: UID used to run Odysseus after startup bootstrapping. This mirrors upstream PUID behavior; Unraid's nobody user is usually 99.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: GID used to run Odysseus after startup bootstrapping. This mirrors upstream PGID behavior; Unraid's users group is usually 100.

Config.Name: LLM Host
Config.Description: Primary LLM host. For a model server on the Unraid host, use host.docker.internal or the Unraid server IP.

Config.Name: LLM Hosts
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated list of additional LLM hosts for model discovery.

Config.Name: Ollama Base URL
Config.Description: Optional OpenAI-compatible Ollama base URL. For Ollama on the Unraid host, use http://host.docker.internal:11434/v1.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: Optional OpenAI API key. Prefer adding providers in the app unless you want to pre-seed this secret.

Config.Name: Research LLM Endpoint
Config.Description: Optional research service LLM endpoint, for example http://host.docker.internal:8000/v1/chat/completions.

Config.Name: SearXNG Instance
Config.Description: SearXNG URL for web search. Run SearXNG separately on Unraid and point this at it, for example http://host.docker.internal:8080.

Config.Name: SearXNG Secret
Config.Description: Optional SearXNG cookie/CSRF secret if you need to pin it.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: Database connection URL. Default keeps the SQLite database inside the persisted /app/data path.

Config.Name: Authentication Enabled
Config.Description: Enable Odysseus login. Keep true for Docker, LAN, reverse proxy, and shared deployments.

Config.Name: Localhost Auth Bypass
Config.Description: Development-only auth bypass for loopback requests. Keep false on Unraid.

Config.Name: Initial Admin Password
Config.Description: Optional first admin password to seed during setup. Set before first boot if you do not want a generated initial password.

Config.Name: Allowed Origins
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated CORS allowed origins. For reverse proxy/public use, restrict this to your exact external origin.

Config.Name: ChromaDB Host
Config.Description: ChromaDB service host. Run ChromaDB separately on Unraid and use host.docker.internal or the ChromaDB container IP/name if routable.

Config.Name: ChromaDB Port
Config.Description: ChromaDB service port. Odysseus compose maps host port 8100 to ChromaDB container port 8000.

Config.Name: Embedding URL
Config.Description: Optional OpenAI-compatible /v1/embeddings endpoint. Default is derived from LLM_HOST and Ollama's 11434 port.

Config.Name: Embedding Model
Config.Description: Embedding model name that must be available at EMBEDDING_URL.

Config.Name: FastEmbed Model
Config.Description: Local fallback embedding model used when no HTTP embedding API is available. Downloads on first use.

Config.Name: FastEmbed Cache Path
Config.Description: Optional FastEmbed cache path. Leave blank to use the default cache inside the container.

Config.Name: Cleanup Interval Hours
Config.Description: Cleanup interval in hours.

Config.Name: In-process Email Pollers
Config.Description: Set to 0 only if an external cron/systemd driver runs Odysseus mail pollers.

Config.Name: In-process Task Runner
Config.Description: Set to 0 only if an external driver fires scheduled tasks.

Config.Name: Script Host
Config.Description: Host used by the built-in run_script scheduled-task action. Empty/local/localhost runs scripts inside the app container; set an SSH host alias for remote execution.
